Package common.core.controllers

Class ControllerBase

  • java.lang.Object
    • common.core.controllers.ControllerBase
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    edu.wpi.first.util.sendable.Sendable, java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Controller, TrapController
    public abstract class ControllerBase
extends java.lang.Object
implements edu.wpi.first.util.sendable.Sendable, java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Team 3128's abstract controller class.
    Since:
    2023 Charged Up

    • Constructor Detail

      • ControllerBase

        public ControllerBase​(PIDFFConfig config,
                      double period)
        Creates a base controller object to control motion.

        Sets kP, kI, kD, kS, kV, kA, kG, constraints, period values.

        Parameters:
        config - PIDFFConfig object containing PID and Feedforward constants.
        period - The controller's update rate in seconds. Must be non-zero and positive.

      • ControllerBase

        public ControllerBase​(PIDFFConfig config)

    • Method Detail

      • setMeasurementSource

        public void setMeasurementSource​(java.util.function.DoubleSupplier measurement)
        Sets the measurement source for PID control.
        Parameters:
        measurement - Returns the current state of the system.

      • addMotor

        public void addMotor​(NAR_Motor motor)
        Adds a motor for controller to send output
        Parameters:
        motor - NAR_Motor motor type.

      • addMotor

        public void addMotor​(edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.motorcontrol.MotorController motor)
        Adds a motor for controller to send output
        Parameters:
        motor - MotorController motor type.

      • addOutput

        public void addOutput​(java.util.function.DoubleConsumer output)
        Adds an output source for controller to send output
        Parameters:
        output - Method that takes the controller's output

      • configureFeedback

        public void configureFeedback​(java.util.function.DoubleSupplier measurement,
                              java.util.function.DoubleConsumer output)

        public abstract void configureFeedback​(NAR_Motor motor)

      • getMeasurement

        public double getMeasurement()
        Returns the measurement of the controller.
        Returns:
        The measurement of the controller.

      • useOutput

        public double useOutput()
        Calculates and sends output voltage.
        Returns:
        Calculated output voltage.

      • calculate

        public double calculate​(double measurement,
                        double setpoint)
        Returns the next output of the PID controller.
        Parameters:
        measurement - The current measurement of the process variable.
        setpoint - The new setpoint of the controller.
        Returns:
        The next controller output.

      • calculate

        public double calculate​(double measurement)
        Returns the next output of the controller.
        Parameters:
        measurement - The current measurement of the process variable.
        Returns:
        The next controller output.

      • calculatePID

        protected abstract double calculatePID​(double measurement)
        Returns the PID output of the controller.
        Parameters:
        measurement - the current measurement of the process variable.
        Returns:
        The controller output due to PID terms.

      • calculateFF

        protected abstract double calculateFF​(double pidOutput)
        Returns the Feed Forward output of the controller.
        Parameters:
        pidOutput - the current measurement of the process variable.
        Returns:
        The controller output due to Feed Forward terms.

      • setPID

        public void setPID​(double kp,
                   double ki,
                   double kd)
        Sets the PID Controller gain parameters.

        Set the proportional, integral, and differential coefficients.

        Parameters:
        kp - The proportional coefficient.
        ki - The integral coefficient.
        kd - The derivative coefficient.

      • setP

        public void setP​(double kp)
        Sets the Proportional coefficient of the PID controller gain.
        Parameters:
        kp - proportional coefficient

      • setI

        public void setI​(double ki)
        Sets the Integral coefficient of the PID controller gain.
        Parameters:
        ki - integral coefficient

      • setD

        public void setD​(double kd)
        Sets the Differential coefficient of the PID controller gain.
        Parameters:
        kd - differential coefficient

      • getP

        public double getP()
        Get the Proportional coefficient.
        Returns:
        proportional coefficient

      • getI

        public double getI()
        Get the Integral coefficient.
        Returns:
        integral coefficient

      • getD

        public double getD()
        Get the Differential coefficient.
        Returns:
        differential coefficient

      • setInputRange

        public void setInputRange​(double minimumInput,
                          double maximumInput)
        Sets the minimum and maximum values expected from the input.

        Input values outside of this range will be clamped.

        Parameters:
        minimumInput - The minimum value expected from the input.
        maximumInput - The maximum value expected from the input.

      • getInputRange

        public double[] getInputRange()
        Returns the minimum and maximum values expected from the input.

        First element is inputMin.

        Second element is inputMax.

        Returns:
        double[] with inputMin and inputMax.

      • setOutputRange

        public void setOutputRange​(double minimumOutput,
                           double maximumOutput)
        Sets the minimum and maximum values of the controller output.

        Output values outside of this range will be clamped.

        Parameters:
        minimumOutput - The minimum value to write.
        maximumOutput - The maximum value to write.

      • getOutputRange

        public double[] getOutputRange()
        Returns the minimum and maximum values expected from the output.

        First element is outputMin.

        Second element is outputMax.

        Returns:
        double[] with outputMin and outputMax.

      • enableContinuousInput

        public void enableContinuousInput​(double minimumInput,
                                  double maximumInput)
        Enables continuous input.

        Rather then using the max and min input range as constraints, it considers them to be the same point and automatically calculates the shortest route to the setpoint.

        Parameters:
        minimumInput - The minimum value expected from the input.
        maximumInput - The maximum value expected from the input.

      • setTolerance

        public void setTolerance​(double measurementTolerance)
        Sets the error which is considered tolerable for use with atSetpoint().
        Parameters:
        measurementTolerance - Position error which is tolerable.

      • setTolerance

        public void setTolerance​(double measurementTolerance,
                         double measurementROCTolerance)
        Sets the error which is considered tolerable for use with atSetpoint().
        Parameters:
        measurementTolerance - Position error which is tolerable.
        measurementROCTolerance - Velocity error which is tolerable.

      • setDisableAtSetpoint

        public void setDisableAtSetpoint​(boolean disabledAtSetpoint)

      • atSetpoint

        public boolean atSetpoint()
        Returns true if the error is within the tolerance of the setpoint.

        This will return false until at least one input value has been computed.

        Returns:
        Whether the error is within the acceptable bounds.

      • setSetpoint

        public void setSetpoint​(double setpoint)
        Sets the setpoint for the PIDController.
        Parameters:
        setpoint - The desired setpoint.

      • getSetpoint

        public double getSetpoint()
        Returns the current setpoint of the PIDController.
        Returns:
        The current setpoint.

      • reset

        public void reset()
        Resets the previous error and the integral term.

        public PIDFFConfig getConfig()

      • getPeriod

        public double getPeriod()
        Gets the period of this controller.
        Returns:
        The period of the controller.

        Returns the PIDController responsible for PID output
        Returns:
